title: Midnight Ukrainian Chickpea Dumplings
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish with a twist, these dumplings are filled with a hearty chickpea mixture and served with a side of tangy sauce.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and warm water to form a dough. Knead for 5 minutes.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the chickpea mixture in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes.
While the dumplings are cooking, heat the sour cream and dill in a small saucepan over low heat.
Serve the dumplings with the sour cream sauce.
Garnish with chopped fresh dill and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
